name: Toyota Land Cruiser Prado TX
description: Showroom-condition Prado TX with full service history. NTSA logbook verified, fresh import duty paid, ready for Kenyan roads from Nairobi to Turkana.

name: Mercedes-Benz C200 AMG Line
description: Executive C-Class with AMG Line package, panoramic roof and Burmester sound. Locally maintained, accident-free.

name: BMW X5 xDrive40i
description: Loaded X5 with M Sport package, head-up display and laser lights. The benchmark luxury SUV for Kenyan terrain.

name: Mazda CX-5 Skyactiv
description: Fuel-efficient family SUV. Perfect first car for upcountry trips with full leather interior and reverse camera.

name: Tesla Model 3 Long Range
description: Pure electric performance with 580 km range. Includes wall charger and free Supercharger credits.

name: Subaru Forester XT
description: Symmetrical AWD, great for safari weekends. Recently serviced with new tyres and brake pads.
